rationale: Educ. Code §29.1534 governs prekindergarten program outreach and notification. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The agency shall develop joint strategies with other state agencies regarding methods to increase community awareness of prekindergarten programs
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and prekindergarten notification statute.
